assertions.expectation: Identifies Service A (minAvailable=100%) as a guaranteed upgrade blocker — no disruptions allowed at all
assertions.reason: Correctly identifies Service A as blocking upgrades and explains that 100% minAvailable requires ALL pods to remain available simultaneously, preventing eviction during node drain

assertions.expectation: Identifies Service B (maxUnavailable=0) as also blocking upgrades — same effect as 100% minAvailable
assertions.reason: Correctly identifies Service B as blocking upgrades and explicitly states it's 'identical to 100% availability requirement' where zero pods can be unavailable

assertions.expectation: States Service C (minAvailable=2 with 3 replicas) is safe — allows 1 pod disruption at a time
assertions.reason: Correctly marks Service C as safe, explains it allows 1 pod (33%) to be unavailable, and describes how 1 pod can be evicted while 2 remain serving

assertions.expectation: States Service D (maxUnavailable=1 with 5 replicas) is safe — allows 1 pod down at a time
assertions.reason: Correctly marks Service D as safe and explains it allows 1 pod to be unavailable while 4 remain serving during drain

assertions.expectation: Recommends fixing Service A: change to minAvailable=N-1 or maxUnavailable=1
assertions.reason: Provides specific fix recommendation changing to minAvailable: '80%' or minAvailable: N-1 where N is replica count

assertions.expectation: Recommends fixing Service B: change to maxUnavailable=1
assertions.reason: Explicitly recommends changing Service B from maxUnavailable: 0 to maxUnavailable: 1

assertions.expectation: Explains that GKE respects PDBs for up to 1 hour during surge upgrades, then may force-drain
assertions.reason: States 'GKE respects PDBs for up to 1 hour during surge upgrades, then force-evicts' and mentions the same 1-hour timeout applies to blue-green upgrades

assertions.expectation: Provides kubectl patch commands to fix the problematic PDBs
assertions.reason: Provides specific kubectl patch commands for both Service A and Service B with exact syntax to fix the PDB configurations

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing PDB changes in a non-production environment first
assertions.reason: Explicitly recommends 'Test in staging: Before your next upgrade, validate the new PDB settings don't break your availability requirements during normal operations'
